title: Hot work near hydrocarbon or gas hazard
excerpt: Hot-work controls should account for nearby flammable gas readings, isolation status, and active permits before work proceeds.

title: Confined-space entry atmospheric checks
excerpt: Confined-space work requires atmospheric monitoring and escalation when toxic or flammable readings trend toward alarm thresholds.

title: Simultaneous operations review
excerpt: Concurrent permits in the same or adjacent zones should be reviewed for spatial and temporal conflict before execution.

title: Shift handover risk continuity
excerpt: Open hazards and active permits should be explicitly carried across shift handover to avoid loss of situational awareness.

title: Incident evidence preservation
excerpt: Safety events should preserve source readings, permit identifiers, timestamps, and operator actions for later review.
